briefdescription.para: Map i2c_bus_t to STM32 HAL I2C handle.

memberdef.argsstring: (i2c_bus_t bus, uint8_t addr, uint8_t reg, uint16_t len)
memberdef.name: start_rx_mem_interrupt

memberdef.argsstring: (i2c_bus_t bus, uint8_t addr, const uint8_t *data, uint16_t len)
memberdef.name: start_tx_interrupt

memberdef.argsstring: (i2c_bus_t bus, uint8_t addr, uint8_t reg, const uint8_t *data, uint16_t len)
memberdef.name: start_tx_mem_interrupt

detaileddescription.para: This implementation allows reading and writing to I2C devices
